---
title: "Sample Project Title"
date: 2026-04-11
description: "A sample project entry for your academic homepage."
---

# Sample Project Title

## Background

This project explores a metasurface-enabled optical information processing architecture.

## Innovation

The project combines physical optical encoding with computational reconstruction.

## My Role

I designed the concept, simulation framework, and system validation pipeline.

## Related Outputs

- Paper 1
- Patent 1
- Conference Talk 1
